title: When was the Evamonkey forum created
display_title: When was the Evamonkey forum created
wikitext:
[]: When was the Evamonkey forum created?             Quote Post by Mihrdat » Wed Jul 15, 2020 2:33 am I know that this forum was created in 2007, but there are posts from 2004. The 10th anniversary post in 2017 stated that this forum was merged with Evamonkey, an older site. So when was this old forum created?

[]: Re: When was the Evamonkey forum created?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 15, 2020 3:47 am The original EvaMonkey forums were launched mid-June '04; at this remove I don't quite recall the sequence of events that led to the forums being re-hosted and re-branded in '07, but they included some technical issues around the hosting, that left the forums off-line for some weeks, rather than it being any sort of internal coup. Hosting issues happened again a few years ago, but that was a rather more seamless event, even though behind the scenes it took more work to achieve. In each case, the existing forum database was moved en masse , with any changes made being those forced by the the inevitable change in pbpBB version used. Most of those changes are invisible to the user, but there are still likely to be a few pre-07 posts where non-ASCII characters (like "smart quotes") got broken and haven't been fixed up, and a number of posts from before the more recent transition where some of the BBCode tags appear as literals in the text -- usually 's' tags, some uppercase 'URL's and a few others that grew ':gibberish'.

Article: When was the Evamonkey forum created
[]: When was the Evamonkey forum created?             Quote Post by Mihrdat » Wed Jul 15, 2020 2:33 am I know that this forum was created in 2007, but there are posts from 2004. The 10th anniversary post in 2017 stated that this forum was merged with Evamonkey, an older site. So when was this old forum created?

[]: Re: When was the Evamonkey forum created?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 15, 2020 3:47 am The original EvaMonkey forums were launched mid-June '04; at this remove I don't quite recall the sequence of events that led to the forums being re-hosted and re-branded in '07, but they included some technical issues around the hosting, that left the forums off-line for some weeks, rather than it being any sort of internal coup. Hosting issues happened again a few years ago, but that was a rather more seamless event, even though behind the scenes it took more work to achieve. In each case, the existing forum database was moved en masse , with any changes made being those forced by the the inevitable change in pbpBB version used. Most of those changes are invisible to the user, but there are still likely to be a few pre-07 posts where non-ASCII characters (like "smart quotes") got broken and haven't been fixed up, and a number of posts from before the more recent transition where some of the BBCode tags appear as literals in the text -- usually 's' tags, some uppercase 'URL's and a few others that grew ':gibberish'.
